Maintainer.Profile: Maintainer of HBAviewer — an Unraid plugin for monitoring LSI / Broadcom SAS HBAs (SAS2, SAS3, and SAS3.5 tri-mode) directly from the web UI: temperature, PHY health, attached drives, SMART, and the firmware event log, with the correct backend auto-detected per card. A community fork extending DevlinDelFuego's original Unraid-LSIUtil.
